articles.description: The quickest strike in this season's Champions League, seven goals, two red cards and the competition's 15-time winners exiting in anger - once again the knockout stages of European club football's elite tournament has delivered drama in spades.
articles.title: Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid: Giants deliver Champions League classic

articles.description: Arsenal set up Champions League semi-final tie with Atletico Madrid after a 0-0 draw with Sporting secured a 1-0 aggregate victory over the two legs
articles.title: Arsenal reach Champions League semi-finals with draw against Sporting

articles.description: Sergio Garcia says LIV Golf's players were told earlier this year the event would run for "many years" as rumours swirl the Saudi-backed venture is on the verge of collapse.
articles.title: LIV Golf: Sergio Garcia says players told Saudi Arabia venture would run for 'many years' amid rumours of collapse

articles.description: After losing out to Bayern Munich in a thrilling Champions League quarter-final, Real Madrid face the prospect of a trophyless season that could cost Alvaro Arbeloa his job.
articles.title: Real Madrid set for rare trophyless season - will Arbeloa pay the price?

articles.description: France forward Hugo Ekitike is expected to miss the World Cup after suffering a suspected Achilles injury during Liverpool's Champions League defeat by Paris St-Germain.
articles.title: Hugo Ekitike set to miss World Cup as Liverpool fear lengthy lay-off

articles.description: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire will miss Saturday's trip to Chelsea after receiving an additional one-match ban.
articles.title: Harry Maguire to miss Chelsea after Man Utd man gets further ban

articles.description: Jamie Murray, who became the first British doubles player to rise to world number one, has announced his retirement from tennis.
articles.title: British doubles legend Jamie Murray retires from tennis

articles.description: England captain Ben Stokes says he "got out quite lucky" with major facial surgery after an incident in the nets at Durham.
articles.title: Ben Stokes: England captain 'might not be here' after being hit in face by ball

articles.description: Three-time Olympic champion Adam Peaty continues his fine form by winning the 50m breaststroke at the Aquatics GB Swimming Championships in London.
articles.title: Aquatics GB Swimming Championships: Adam Peaty looks to LA after winning 50m British title

articles.description: Former winner Luca Brecel fails to qualify for the 2026 World Snooker Championship, losing to Wales' Jak Jones in the last qualifying round.
articles.title: 2026 World Snooker Championship: Former winner Luca Brecel misses out on Crucible spot
